name: Yuri and Natsuki: The Argument | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
This contains all the Doki's, but the focus is on when Yuri and Natsuki got into an argument! (Not exactly like the game.)

Well! Well! Well! I did it, I went ahead and made the scenario people had asked for a few times in the past! The infamous ARGUMENT scene!

!Trigger Warning!

This MENTIONS self harm in the introduction message. Though, there is no physical self harm. Just mentions of it. I still wanted to warn those who are sensitive. 🙏🏻💙

  • Angst & Fluff Prioritized! — No horror and no Smut!

  • The Scenario! — In this scenario, it's grounded a little more in reality! Nothing gets all wacky, but, it does get intense between Yuri and Natsuki! Sayori and Monika are also however there as well! I did edit some parts out the original argument scene. I also wrote all of it myself, so it still makes sense in this little alternative scenario! I have left options for people's favorite Doki. You are not forced to pick a side! (The best path, is the path with all of them.)

  • ANYPOV! The Doki's all like you regardless of gender, like usual. 🙏🏻💙

  • Lengthy Introduction Message! — For those who want to get up to speed on it, or refreshed. I have wrote quite a lot! You are of course, welcome to ignore most of it. And pull a 'I ain't readin' allat' 💙

That's about it! 🙏🏻💙

People can hopefully stop asking for this scenario in the future! Because I've now officially made it! And, I hope you enjoy it. Leave a review if you do! And tell me what you and the Doki's did! Did you comfort Yuri? Did you side with Natsuki? Did you... Bully Natsuki? I wanna know!

My Discord: HERE!

No memes is still so weird...
creator: GhostOfOmi
